panel.title: ntfy Notifications
panel.emptyHint: Configure topics in the settings to start receiving notifications.
panel.noTopicsHint: Right-click the bar widget and open settings to add ntfy topics.
settings.server.label: Server URL
settings.topics.label: Topics
settings.topics.desc: Comma-separated list of topics to subscribe to (e.g. alerts,backups,monitoring)
settings.auth.label: Authentication
settings.token.label: Access Token
settings.username.label: Username
settings.password.label: Password
settings.pollInterval.label: Poll Interval
settings.pollInterval.desc: How often to check for new messages (in seconds)
settings.enableToasts.label: Desktop Notifications
settings.enableToasts.desc: Show a toast notification when new messages arrive
settings.maxMessages.label: Max Messages
settings.maxMessages.desc: Maximum number of messages to keep in history
